sampled_pages.notes: Home preview uses the electronics color system and shows the hero, search, cart, user, and product discovery surface.
Header controls render in the local runtime with menu, user, cart, and translated search placeholder visible.
Listing page renders product cards with actionable pricing and purchase controls.
Category page is covered by local routing and product grid rendering.
Product detail page renders electronics attributes, price, and add-to-cart surface.
Mobile product detail page remains readable and interactive.
Cart and checkout entry are visually covered with populated cart data.
Checkout fixture validates cart behavior under a focused checkout scenario.
Customer order page is covered by the local page inventory.
Offer page renders without missing local alternatives.
Empty-store fixture remains available for visual fallback review.

followups: The local runtime now mimics header controls more closely, but Salla's real Twilight components remain the final authority for manual Salla review.
notes: Reviewed after fixing preview colors, translation lookup, local runtime header controls, icon fallbacks, and the generated product flip-card selector. Browser smoke passed across all generated electronics-store preview pages.
